note: The model-family card catalog — the Librarian's ledger. Standing state for the KUDBEE/HERMES model-training program: per-model status, checkpoint/adapter + dataset lineage, eval scores WITH run counts (a single unconfirmed run is never settled), KUDBEE-GATE promotion state, budgets, train order, and next actions. Read by lib/hermes/modelFamily.ts (invariants CI-enforced by modelFamily.test.ts) and by the Lightning agent at every GPU-session start/end (protocol: docs/lightning-librarian.md). See brain/README.md for the full brain/ folder index.

librarian.what: The overseer role for the model-training team — one level above the phases. Conductor routes one song's agents; the Librarian oversees the model family itself. It is a role either side (a kudbee-music session or the Lightning agent) puts on when touching this file, not a new process.
owns: the model registry: every model's status, lineage, and next action live here and nowhere else
KUDBEE-GATE enforcement: no model is promoted without every stage cleared (CI-checked, not honor-system)
dataset lineage: which dataset id + recipe produced which adapter, pinned at train time
train order when GPU time is scarce (the trainOrder queue below + its tie-break rules)
stall detection: any model past staleAfterDays with no lastTouched update gets escalated, never skipped silently (the CI-noise rule, applied to training)
budget watch: flag at 80% of any cap, hard-stop at 100%
drift audits on promoted models (the driftWatch cadence below)
never: spend past a phase usdCap or start a paid GPU session past the monthlyUsdCap without an explicit founder go — raising a cap is a founder decision
promote a model without KUDBEE-GATE fully cleared (modelFamily.test.ts fails CI on the attempt)
treat a single eval run as a result — confirmed requires promotionGate.confirmRuns runs
write a secret anywhere in git: endpoint URLs may be recorded here, bearer tokens NEVER (gitignored .env.local / Studio env only)
fine-tune the MiniMax teacher (MoE, far too large for a single RTX 6000) — teacher and comparison provider only
delete a previous adapter — rollback depends on every promoted version staying on disk
let the sidecar stall the main phases

promotionGate.name: KUDBEE-GATE
promotionGate.what: The one pipeline every model in the family must clear, end to end, before it serves kudbee-music. Generalized from the SCRIBE v1→v2 pattern; the worked example lives in docs/lightning-librarian.md.

stages.G0-dataset: dataset regenerated fresh, $0, locally (GEN_TRAINING_DATA=1 npx vitest run trainingData); row count meets the task's floor; out/training-data/REPORT.md checked for dupes; dataset id + rows pinned in this file
stages.G1-train: recipe recorded verbatim (base model, LoRA config, precision, epochs, batch); val loss beats the family baseline or the miss is explained in the run's notes file
stages.G2-verify: checkpoint in a servable format (HF/PEFT); one real contract prompt round-trips with valid output (for SCRIBE: the buildLightningLineRewritePrompt() format returning {"alternatives":[...]} JSON)
stages.G3-eval: the task's eval suite run at least confirmRuns times; all pass rates recorded here with run counts; variance past ±10% means diagnose (sampling/harness/model) before anything else
stages.G4-head-to-head: beats the currently promoted model of its family on held-out golden examples (or the base model, if nothing is promoted yet); a loss means grow the dataset and return to G0
stages.G5-serve: endpoint live behind LitServe; ping + one real round-trip via studio/lightning.mjs; endpoint URL recorded here — the bearer token never
stages.G6-promote: founder acknowledges; endpoint + key go in kudbee-music's gitignored .env.local by the founder's hand; status flips to promoted here; the previous adapter's path stays recorded for rollback

versioning.modelIds: KUDBEE<TASK>V<major> (KUDBEESCRIBEV1, KUDBEECODEV0, …) or HERMES-<TASK> before a first major. Major bumps only when dataset or recipe changes materially; an identical-recipe re-run is a new run notes file, not a new version.
versioning.adapters: one immutable directory per run under /teamspace/studios/this_studio/<family>-runs/<modelId>-r<runNumber>-<base-short>-lora — never overwritten, never deleted
versioning.datasets: <task>@<YYYY-MM-DD>+r<rows> (e.g. scribe-line-rewrite@2026-07-05+r212), pinned from out/training-data/REPORT.md at G0
versioning.trainingNotes: kudbee-code-v0/training-notes/<YYYY-MM-DD>_<MODELID>_<what>.md — every run's receipt; each references the exact dataset id + adapter directory it produced

rules: unblock served baselines before training anything new (a served v1 is the thing a v2 must beat)
confirm unconfirmed evals before new GPU spend
richest dataset + clearest eval first; the most subjective task (cover) goes last
the founder can reorder by editing this queue — the agent never reorders silently

budget.assumptions: RTX 6000 Lightning Studio ≈ $2/GPU-hour — a founder-adjustable ESTIMATE; correct it here the first time a real bill disagrees
budget.rule: Flag to the founder at 80% of any cap; hard-stop at 100%. spentUsd above usdCap fails CI on purpose — an overrun must be resolved by a founder raising the cap, never by the agent running on.

phases.covers: 2 more eval runs + wiring (roadmap Phase 2); a below-bar retrain draws from P4's style of budget, not this one
dataset growth is $0/local; train + 3-run eval + head-to-head (roadmap Phase 3)
one multi-task LoRA first, per-task splits only on demonstrated interference (roadmap Phase 4)
idle time on the second studio ONLY — this line stays 0; a paid session that exists solely for the sidecar is out of policy

driftWatch.owner: the Librarian (whichever agent wears the role that session) — a missed check is a stall and gets escalated like one
driftWatch.monthly: light check on every promoted model: pull ~20 logged outputs, screen for banned words + famous phrases (lib/hermes/safety.ts) and cliché drift; verdict recorded in a dated notes file + a history event here
driftWatch.quarterly: deep audit: re-run the model's full eval suite confirmRuns times against the scores recorded at promotion; a regression triggers the rollback path in docs/lightning-librarian.md
